sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date DateTime, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00'), 'New Year Event');
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (2, toDateTime('2024-01-14 15:30:00'), 'Mid January Check');
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (3, toDateTime('2024-01-21 12:00:00'), 'Third Week Event');
SELECT id, subtractWeeks(EXTRACT(DAY FROM event_date), 1) AS day_minus_week FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, subtractWeeks(event_date, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_date) + 1) AS modified_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, subtractWeeks(toDate('2024-01-01'), 1), EXTRACT(YEAR FROM event_date) AS event_year FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_date, NULLIF(subtractWeeks(event_date, 2), event_date) AS null_handling_test FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, event_date, subtractWeeks(event_date, EXTRACT(DAY FROM event_date) + 1) AS edge_case_test FROM test_dates HAVING edge_case_test > '2024-01-01 00:00:00';
SELECT id, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM subtractWeeks(event_date, 3)) AS month_before_event FROM test_dates WHERE subtractWeeks(event_date, 3) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY month_before_event;
